title: High Seat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''High Seat''' was a throne-like chair that was sat in the ''[[dukha]]'' that served as the center of a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] clan. It would be the only seat in the room, and would be where the clan leader sat. During the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] reign, all [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governors]] were permitted to sit upon the throne, in reverence to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}
